# Prostate Miracle

> Prostate Miracle® Advanced Formula is a prostate health supplement delivering
> 300mg of beta-sitosterol per capsule — sourced from non-GMO European pine at
> 99% purity. Trusted by 100,000+ customers since 2001. 60-day money-back guarantee.

## Product

- [Prostate Miracle Advanced Formula](https://prostatemiracle.com/prostate-miracle): Product page — 300mg beta-sitosterol per capsule, ingredients, dosage, and ordering.
- [The Science](https://prostatemiracle.com/the-science): Clinical research and evidence behind beta-sitosterol for prostate and urinary health.
- [Testimonials](https://prostatemiracle.com/testimonials): Customer reviews and results from men aged 40–70.

## Key Facts

- Active ingredient: Beta-sitosterol 300mg per capsule (non-GMO European pine, 99% pure)
- Also contains: Vitamin D3, Zinc
- Dosage: 2 capsules per day (1 morning, 1 evening)
- In market since: 2001
- Customers served: 100,000+
- Guarantee: 60-day money-back (return 2 empty bottles, full refund minus shipping)
- Free shipping on orders of 3+ bottles

## Policies

- [Refund Policy](https://prostatemiracle.com/refund-policy): 60-day money-back guarantee.
- [Shipping Policy](https://prostatemiracle.com/shipping-policy): Free shipping on 3+ bottles.
